cmd: echo '--- RAM:'; free -h; echo '--- DISK:'; df -h /; echo '--- CPU:'; nproc; grep -m1 'model name' /proc/cpuinfo; echo '--- DOCKER:'; docker --version 2>&1; docker compose version 2>&1; systemctl is-active docker 2>&1; echo '--- PORTS 80/443:'; ss -tln | grep -E ':80 |:443 ' || echo 'вільні'; echo '--- LOAD:'; uptime
